macadamia-and-brown-butter-blondies.name: Macadamia And Brown Butter Blondies

ingredients.item: Whole raw or toasted macadamia nuts
Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt
Plus 7 tbsp. (packed; 285 g) dark brown sugar

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Lightly coat a 9"-diameter cake pan with nonstick spray and line bottom with a parchment paper round. If using raw macadamia nuts, toast on a rimmed baking sheet, tossing once, until golden, 8–10 minutes. Let cool, then coarsely chop.

Scrape vanilla seeds into a small saucepan; add pod and butter. Set over medium-low heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until butter foams, then browns, 6–8 minutes. Transfer to a medium bowl, scraping in all of the browned bits. Using tongs, remove and discard vanilla pod.

Whisk all-purpose and barley flours, baking powder, and salt in another medium bowl. Add brown sugar to brown butter and stir to combine. Add eggs one at a time, stirring well after each addition. Stir in dry ingredients, then vanilla extract and nuts. Scrape batter into prepared pan; smooth top.
Bake blondies, rotating halfway through, until top is golden brown and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean, 40–45 minutes. Let cool.
Turn out blondies, remove parchment, and cut into 12 wedges. Serve each with a scoop of ice cream if desired.

macaroni-souffle-pie-argiro.name: Macaroni Souffle Pie
instructions: Boil the pasta in plenty of salted water for 7 minutes and strain.
Add half the butter and mix.
Mix the feta cheese with the graviera in a bowl.
Brush the base and side walls of a long baking pan 24 x 35 cm with the remaining butter. Spread half the pasta in a layer.
We divide the zamboni and half the cheese mixture above.
Cover with thin tomato slices and sprinkle with some chives.
Close the pie with the remaining pasta in a layer.
Sprinkle with the other cheeses. Gently press the surface of the pasta pie so that there are no gaps.
Melt in a bowl with the fork the fresh antroot by adding some of the milk to obtain a creamy texture.
Beat eggs with the remaining milk, some salt, pepper and nutmeg in another bowl. We also incorporate the melted anthotyr by mixing. Add the pasta mixture to the baking pan.
Bake the pie in a preheated oven at 180
Let it stand for 10 minutes outside the oven and then cut into pieces. We serve it ideally while it is still warm.

macaroni-with-roasted-cherry-tomatoes-an.name: Macaroni With Roasted Cherry Tomatoes And Sour Myzithra
macaroni-with-roasted-cherry-tomatoes-an.original_name: Μακαρόνια με ψητά ντοματίνια και ξυνομυζήθρα

ingredients.item: 1 cup of water boiled by pasta
Finely chopped fresh thyme or oregano)
1 cup of water boiled by pasta
Finely chopped fresh thyme or oregano)

instructions: To make the pasta with grilled tomatoes and sour cheese, we start with the tomatoes.
Cut the tomatoes in half and add them to a baking pan.
Sprinkle with salt blossom, herbs and sprinkle with olive oil.
Bake at 200oC for 10′ – 15′.

madeira-honey-cake-teleculinaria.name: Madeira Honey Cake
instructions: Numa picadora ou robot de cozinha, pique bem todos os frutos secos e cristalizados. Reserve.
Wipe the sugar with flour, baking soda, cinnamon and nutmeg. Involve with the mixture of fruits and connect everything with honey, eggs, milk, wood wine, butter and lard.
Knead well and lay the preparation in a shape (24 cm in diameter x 6 cm in height), greased with butter and with the bottom lined with vegetable paper.

Take it to the oven, preheated at 200°C, for about 1 hour and 15 minutes. In the middle of the cooking, cover the cake with vegetable paper and reduce the temperature to 180oC. Remove, let cool, deform and serve with decor to taste.

madrid-cream-bartollos-pequerecetas.name: Madrid Cream Bartollos

ingredients.item: 50 g de harina de trigo de fuerza
Sunflower or soft olive oil, quantity necessary to fry

instructions: In a saucepan, heat milk with the essence of vanilla till it's about to boil. In a separate bowl, beat the egg yolks with the sugar till the mixture is sparkling. Incorporates the maicena into the mixture of yolks and sugar, beating well to avoid clumps. Fold hot milk onto an egg, sugar and maicene mixture, stirring constantly to avoid fringes. Transfer the mixture back to the saucepan and cook with medium-low heat, while stirring, till the cream thick and gain a smooth and sedous consistency. Withdraw the cream from the fire and let completely cool before using it to fill up the pits.

To make the mass of the Madrid seedlings, it starts with a combination of pastries and padded wheat and force in a large bowl. He adds Iberic pork butter, with a flavour and a fritty texture characteristic of the seedlings. He then incorporates the white wine and salt. The wine doesn't only improve the taste but also contributes to the elasticity of the mass, making it easier to work. Once all the ingredients are combined, amasa well to get a smooth and homogenous mass. It's important to get the right consistency to get them cold properly. Let rest the mass, allowing the gluten to relax and the mass to be more manageable by stretching it.

Stretch the mass with a roller onto a pitted surface and get an approximately 3 mm thickness. Cut squares or mass circles with the desired size for your bawks. Put a teaspoon of pastry cream at the centre of each mass circle. Fold the dough onto the pilling and form a triangle or a semiluna and press the edges with your fingers or with a fork to seal them well. It heats abundant sunflower oil in a frying pan with medium-high heat. Fry the steaks into hot oil till they are golden and crispy from outside. Remove the oil bawks with a frying and scrape them on absorbing paper to remove excess oil. Sprinkle the cheesebirds with sugarglas before serving.

make-a-delicious-barbecue-burrito-comede.name: Make A Delicious Barbecue Burrito
make-a-delicious-barbecue-burrito-comede.original_name: Haz un rico burrito de barbacoa
instructions: Put the beef into a pot with water to cover. Add garlic, onion broken into pieces, bay, salt and pepper. It cooks at low heat for about 3 hours or until the meat is very soft and easily crumbling.

While cooking the meat, licks the guajillo chiles, broad chili, cumin, oregano and cinnamon with some cooking water from the meat. Fold the salsa and add it to the pot for the last 30 minutes of cooking.
Once cooked, crumble the meat and mix with the sauce.
It slightly warmens the flour tortillas to make them more flexible.
At each omelette, place a portion of refritos beans, Red Rice and Jawped Barbeet.
Add purple onion, cilantro and salsa to your taste. If you prefer a fresh touch, press some lemon juice onto the flesh.
Enrolla el burrito, doblando los extremos hacia adentro y luego rodando desde un lado hasta cerrarlo.
Warm an oil-free frying pan and place the burrito with the bent bottom to seal and crisp. Do it both ways.

make-creamy-onion-sauce-at-home-comedera.name: Make Creamy Onion Sauce At Home
make-creamy-onion-sauce-at-home-comedera.original_name: Prepara salsa de cebolla cremosa en casa
instructions: A pot with medium heat puts butter, pour onions and cover the pot. Wait till they get soft but don't change color (coffee) 6-7 minutes.
Add the flour and stir, cook for another 2 minutes.
Retira del fuego y empieza a agregar la leche mientras revuelves constantemente.
Regresa al fuego (bajo) y cocina por 2 minutos.
Pass the salsa to a blender and moan till purée and soft.
Sazona con sal y pimienta al gusto.
The salsa goes back to the pot and cooks with low heat until it reduces a little and has a thicker texture for 3-4 minutes.
Retira y espolvorea perejil.
Sirve y disfruta.

malaga-salchichon-tartar-pequerecetas.name: Malaga Salchichona Tartar

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon of cane honey (frying if they can be)
A handful of raisins (best if they're muscatel)
1 cucharada de cebollino seco o fresco

instructions: We remove his skin and pat his parrot with a very fine knife, by hand and without shredding. It's got to have texture, as a pat of flesh.
We also cut into small pieces the cucumbers, raisins and capers. If the raisins are big, they better be cut in half
In a bowl, we mix salchicdon with minced and onions.
Also, we make our suit with mayonnaise, mustard, cane honey and lemon juice. We mix well till a soft sauce remains.
Let's put the cuff onto the pat and gently remove till everything's well integrated. We cover and let cold in the refrigerator about 30 minutes.
Se puede presentar en un cuenco o en forma de timbal con un aro de cocina.
Come with him with scrag, pits, toast or anything at your best. Cold, with something crispy, it's how best to enjoy itself.

malebi-argiro.name: Malebi

ingredients.item: Mixed fresh fruits finely chopped for garnishing
Mixed fresh fruits finely chopped for garnishing

instructions: Add the cold milk, sugar and corn flour to a pot.
Mix very well with the wire until the cornflare dissolves.
After it melts well, put the pot in the eye and over medium heat, always stirring,
Allow the mixture to fasten and thicken for about 8 to 10 minutes.
Drizzle a shallow, long, small baking pan with a little rose water (min. drops).
Empty the light cream and let it cool well.
After it cools, refrigerate it to cool.
When we want to serve, we get a squared piece on a plate.
We sprinkle it with rose water.
Add finely chopped fresh fruits, sprinkle the sugar and spread whole peanuts of Aegine.

malibu-bay-breeze.name: Malibu Bay Breeze
instructions: Fill a tall glass with ice.
Pour, in this order, coconut rum, pineapple juice, and cranberry juice over ice.

mallorcan-apricot-coca-pequerecetas.name: Mallorcan Apricot Coca

ingredients.item: 1 sachet of chemical yeast (billing powder, 16 g)

instructions: Lavamos los albaricoques, los partimos por la mitad y retiramos los huesos. Reservamos.
In a big bowl, we beat our eggs with sugar till they are sparkling and double their volume. We can use electrical rods to make it easier.
We add oil and milk and lemon fringes and we continue to bat and integrate all the fluids well.
We tanked the flour with the yeast and put it into the earlier mixture. We mix with wrapped movements up to a homogenous and frumless mass.
Forramos un molde rectangular o redondo con papel de horno o lo engrasamos con un poco de mantequilla.
Vertemos la masa en el molde y colocamos encima las mitades de albaricoque, con la parte cortada hacia arriba. Hundimos ligeramente cada mitad en la masa, sin que llegue al fondo.
We bake at 180 till 3 ″ (heat up and down, pressurized oven) for about 35-40 minutes, or as soon as we tap with a stick, it goes out clean.
We get the coke out of the oven, we let them warm up at the mold and then we cool completely onto a grid. Once cold, we sprinkle with sugars to taste.

mama-hs-fooled-you-fancy-slow-cooker-tur.name: Mama H's Fooled You Fancy Slow Cooker Turkey Breast
instructions: Place at least 1/2 the fresh parsley and 1/2 the dill into the bottom and slightly up the sides of a slow cooker. Scatter about 1/2 the clementine sections on top. Add turkey breast.
Combine onion flakes, dried parsley, turmeric, onion powder, salt, sugar, celery seed, and black pepper together in a bowl and mix well. Sprinkle generously over the turkey breast in the slow cooker.

Spoon dollops of cranberry sauce all over the turkey and in the corners of the slow cooker pot. Add remaining fresh parsley and dill. Finish with the remaining clementine sections. Cook on Low until turkey is no longer pink in the center and juices run clear, about 5 hours, checking after 4 1/2 hours to make sure it doesn't overcook.

mango-ice-cream-recipe-with-only-3-ingre.name: Mango Ice Cream ( Recipe With Only 3 Ingredients)
mango-ice-cream-recipe-with-only-3-ingre.original_name: Helado de mango casero (receta fácil con sólo 3 Ingredientes)

ingredients.item: Batidora de mano o robot de cocina

instructions: We cross the sugar into a beaker or kitchen robot with blades until it has the consistency of the sugar glas. If you have gum sugar at home, you can skip this step and simply put the necessary quantity into the beaker's glass or kitchen robot.
We added the frozen handle and shredded everything together until we get a smooth blend. If the fruit's too hard, leave it to rest for a few minutes to smooth up a little.
Incorporamos la nata y volvemos a mezclar hasta que se consiga una textura cremosa.
Serve directly or put into the freezer for 30 minutes or an hour for a firmer texture. If mango ice cream's too hard to get them out, we'll let them rest a few minutes before we serve.

mashed-potato-skordalia.name: Mashed Potato Skordalia
instructions: Toast walnuts in a dry small skillet over medium heat, tossing, until golden brown, about 5 minutes. Let cool; finely chop.

Mix potatoes, garlic, lemon zest, lemon juice, 3 Tbsp. oil, and 2 Tbsp. warm water in a medium bowl; season with salt. Drizzle skordalia with oil and top with chives and toasted walnuts. Serve with pita chips and cucumbers.

massaman-curry-paste.name: Massaman Curry Paste

ingredients.prep: tough outer layers removed, thinly sliced

ingredients.item: A spice mill or a mortar and pestle

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Soak chiles in warm water in a small bowl 15 minutes; drain and pat dry.
Toss chiles, garlic, lemongrass, shallot, and galangal with oil on a rimmed baking sheet. Roast, tossing once, until fragrant and chiles are golden brown, 6–8 minutes. Let chile mixture cool.

Meanwhile, combine cardamom, cloves, cinnamon, coriander, and cumin in a small dry skillet and toast over medium heat until fragrant, about 2 minutes; let cool. Gently crush pods and remove cardamom seeds from pods; discard pods. Grind spices in spice mill or with mortar and pestle.
Transfer spices to a food processor; add chile mixture, cilantro, peanuts, nutmeg, turmeric, and salt, and process to a smooth paste.
DO AHEAD: Paste can be made 1 month ahead. Cover and chill, or freeze up to 6 months.

matzo-gnocchi-soup.name: Matzo Gnocchi Soup

ingredients.prep: stalks cut into 1-inch pieces, leaves set aside

instructions: Place first 8 ingredients and 5 quarts water in a large stockpot; season with salt. Bring to a simmer over medium heat. Skim foam from surface; reduce heat to low and cook, keeping at a low simmer and skimming occasionally, for 3 hours.

Using tongs, remove chicken from broth and reserve for another use. Strain broth into a large bowl through a fine-mesh sieve (if desired, line sieve with cheesecloth for clearer broth); set aside. Discard solids. DO AHEAD: Can be made 3 days ahead. Chill uncovered until cold. Cover; keep chilled.

Preheat oven to 400°. Bake potato until tender, about 1 hour. Let cool slightly. Peel potato and pass through a ricer or food mill, or press through the holes in a colander into a medium bowl. Add matzo meal, herbs, and nutmeg; season to taste with salt. Add yolks; stir to form a dough.

Divide dough into 4 pieces. Working with 1 piece at a time and keeping the others covered with a kitchen towel, roll dough into a 12-inch-long rope. Cut into 1-inch pieces. Transfer gnocchi to a parchment paper-lined rimmed baking sheet. Cover with towel.

Bring broth to a simmer in a large pot over medium heat. Season with salt and pepper. Add gnocchi; simmer until tender, 4–5 minutes. Divide mixture among bowls. Drizzle with oil; garnish with celery leaves.

mayas-pesto-pasta-salad.name: Maya's Pesto Pasta Salad

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook fusilli in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 12 minutes. Drain.
Combine basil, Parmesan cheese, pine nuts, oil, and garlic in a food processor; blend to make pesto.
Toss pasta with pesto and mix in red onion, radicchio, and mayonnaise. Season with salt and pepper. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving.

meat-puffs-teleculinaria.name: Meat Puffs
instructions: Take to the medium heat a pot with a thread of olive oil, onion and garlic chopped and let saute for 4 minutes. Add the minced meat and paprika and let cook well.
Add the tomato and wrap it up very well. Season with salt and pepper and let it cook until it's dry. Remove from the fire and let it cool completely.
After thawed, extend the leafy dough on a floured surface and cut strips. Place the previous mixture in the center of the strips and wrap.

Lay out the leafy ones on a tray lined with vegetable paper, and brush them with a beaten egg. Sprinkle with chia seeds and put them in the oven, preheated at 220°C, until they are very tall and golden.

meat-with-mushrooms-wrapped-in-dough-lez.name: Meat With Mushrooms Wrapped In Dough
instructions: 1. Roast the onion until the cockroach in the olive oil.
2. Add and sauce the fine chopped mushrooms.
3. Taste with salt and pepper.
4. Cook for 1-2 minutes in high fire by adding to the cream.
5. Add fresh cake and let it cool.
6. Bake with the front rear in high fire with a little fat addition.
7. Un mix the butter and salt in the form of cube until the bread crumbs in the kitchen robot.
8. Add water and cool it in 1 hour refrigerator by wrapping it from the robot.
9. Cut the dough into 4 parts and open with roller on the lightly unified floor.
10. Share the mushroom mixture to the uniforms of meat.
11. 11. The meats are placed in the inside of the dough you open and close it in the shape of the boh and index the oily paper to the tray.
12. Spread the boiled seeds to the eggs that are whipped into their bases.
12. August Cook until fried in the oven set to 190 degrees.
14 July Serve hot.

meringue-bones-and-ghosts.name: Meringue Bones And Ghosts
instructions: Preheat oven to 107°C (110 degrees C). Line 2 baking sheets with silicone baking mats.
Whisk eggs whites and lemon juice together in a bowl until thick, white, and foamy. Add sugar a spoonful at a time, whisking constantly, until meringue is shiny, thick, and holds its shape.
Transfer meringue to a piping bag. Pipe 12 bone shapes onto a prepared baking sheet. Pipe 12 puffs to resemble ghosts onto the remaining baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until dried and firm, about 1 hour. Turn off the oven, close the door, and cool until completely dried, about 1 hour more.
Dip the tip of a toothpick into melted chocolate and dot chocolate 'eyes' on each of the ghosts.

mesclun-salad-with-veggies-goat-cheese-a.name: Mesclun Salad With Veggies, Goat Cheese, And Crispy Garlic

ingredients.item: Minced fresh dill or 1 teaspoon dried

instructions: In a small sauté pan over moderate heat, melt the butter until it begins to bubble slightly. Add the garlic and sauté, stirring occasionally, until golden brown and slightly crisp, about 2 minutes. Pour the garlic and butter into a small bowl and let cool. Do not clean the pan.
In a small bowl or measuring cup, combine the shallots, lemon juice, olive oil, and Dijon mustard. Whisk to combine then season to taste with fine sea salt and freshly ground black pepper.
Return the small sauté pan to the stove over low heat and toast the pine nuts, stirring occasionally, until aromatic and light golden brown, about 3 minutes. Transfer to a plate and let cool.

In a large bowl, layer the mesclun, pepper, beets, tomatoes, cranberries, and pine nuts. Add the dill, dried onion flakes, and fried garlic, including the butter from the bowl. Shake the dressing thoroughly then drizzle it over the salad and toss to combine. Season to taste with salt and pepper, crumble goat cheese over top, and serve.

methodist-or-wesleyan-bread.name: Methodist Or Wesleyan Bread
instructions: Dissolve 2 teaspoons of sugar in 1 cup of water. Sprinkle the yeast over the water and allow to soften for 5 to 10 minutes. Meanwhile, stir together the molasses, salt, 6 tablespoons of sugar, and shortening into the remaining 3 cups of water in a large bowl until dissolved. Add the raisins, flour, and caraway seed.

Mix together until a dough forms, then turn out onto a lightly floured work surface and knead until smooth and elastic, 10 to 15 minutes. Place into a well oiled bowl, and brush the top with a little melted shortening. Cover with a cloth and allow to rise in a warm place until doubled in bulk, about 1 hour.
Punch down, and allow to rise again until doubled in bulk, another hour.

Lightly grease two 9x5 inch loaf pans. Place the dough on a lightly floured work surface, punch down, then form into two loaves. Place loaves into the pans, cover with a cloth, and allow to rise again until doubled in size.
Preheat oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Bake loaves in preheated oven for 1 hour until they are nicely browned and sound hollow when tapped on the bottom.

mexican-cochinita-pibil-recipe-comedera.name: Mexican Cochinita Pibil Recipe

ingredients.item: 1  chile guajillo hidratado sin venas ni semillas
3 libras de  lomo de cerdo y costilla de cerdo
1  hile habanero finamente picado (, y sin semillas)

instructions: Para preparar el recado rojo, agrega todos los ingredientes del recado en la licuadora y tritura hasta formar una marinada ligeramente espesa. Reserva.
In a large bowl, add the pieces of pork and baits with an escara from the recado.
Mezcla bien para que los ingredientes se integren a la carne, cubre con papel film y deja reposar en el refrigerador durante 4 a 6 horas
For the salsa, add in a bowl the finely minced purple onion, the beesless and finely minced chili, the orange juice, lemon juice, oregano and salt to taste.
Meg and let rest in the refrigerator for at least 4 hours so that all flavors are integrated
When the meat is ready to cook, prepare the pot under pressure as follows: First add enough water (1 to 2 cups) and then form with aluminium a pillow-type base to place onto the surface of the pot
After that, to moan the pot with the banana leaves previously washed and passed by the comal to become more flexible
Reaping the pieces of beef and bathing with the marinade. Wrap up and cover the pot. Wrap well with the leaves and cover the pot. Cooking for 45 minutes.

You will know that the meat will be ready as it crumbles easily as the fork passes. Remove meat from the pot, crumble and baits with the juice you have loosed. Serves in taco with previously prepared salsa, lemon and cilantro.

mexican-migas.name: Mexican Migas

ingredients.prep: finely chopped, or more to taste

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Grease a large skillet with olive oil and place over medium-high heat. Add chorizo and cook until chorizo begins to get crispy, 5 to 6 minutes. Add torn tortillas and cook until crispy and golden brown, 7 to 8 minutes. Add onion, jalapeno, and garlic; cook until vegetables start to get tender, 5 to 6 minutes.

Pour in eggs and hot sauce and cook, stirring occasionally, until eggs are close to your desired doneness, about 5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper. Stir in tomatoes, avocado, lime juice, and Cheddar cheese. Continue cooking until eggs are scrambled to your desired doneness. Portion migas into serving bowls and top each with a dollop of sour cream.

microwave-acorn-squash.name: Microwave Acorn Squash

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Prick insides of the squash halves with a fork; brush with butter and sprinkle with brown sugar. Place squash halves, cut sides-up, into a large, microwave-safe dish.
Microwave on high power until flesh pierces easily with a fork, about 10 minutes. Carefully remove from the microwave and season with salt and pepper. Serve warm.

microwave-spaghetti-squash-meatballs.name: Microwave Spaghetti Squash & Meatballs
instructions: Slice the spaghetti squash in half. If you’re having difficult, poke some holes with a knife, then microwave for 5 minutes.
Scoop out the seeds and innards with a spoon, then rub oil, salt, and pepper all over the surface.
Microwave for about 10-15 minutes until the squash is tender and pulls away from the skin easily.
Using a fork, shred the squash into noodle-like strands.
Microwave the meatballs with the pasta sauce, covered, for about 2 minutes or until the meatballs are fully heated through.
Spoon the meatballs and sauce on top of each spaghetti squash half, garnish with the Parmesan and parsley.
Enjoy!

instructions: We put parchment paper on sheet metal. Spread up the puff pastry.
With a fork we drill it everywhere and bake it in a preheated oven at 220oC, in the air, for 10 minutes.
Remove the puff pastry from the oven and turn it over with the parchment paper.
With kitchen gloves on the hands, press the puff pastry well to deflate and remove the parchment paper.
Lower oven to 170oC and continue baking for about 20 minutes until well golden. We let it cool.
Break cookies into thick pieces.

minced-meat-and-begdi-pastry-lezzet.name: Minced Meat And Begdi Pastry
instructions: 1. Remove eggplants and peel the shells.
2. Heat the butter.

mini-chocolate-cheesecakes-with-graham-c.name: Mini Chocolate Cheesecakes With Graham Cracker Crust
instructions: Preheat the oven to 149°C (150 degrees C). Line a 12-cup muffin tin with paper liners.
Mix graham cracker crumbs, melted butter, and 2 tablespoons sugar together in a small bowl. Press 1 tablespoon of the crumb mixture into the bottom of each prepared cup.
Measure 1/2 cup chocolate chips and set aside for topping. Evenly distribute the remaining chips among the cups, sprinkling them over the crust layer.

Beat cream cheese, 1/2 cup sugar, egg, cocoa powder, and vanilla in a large mixing bowl until smooth. Spoon about 1/4 cup of the cream cheese mixture into each cup. Sprinkle remaining chocolate chips over top.
Bake in the preheated oven until just set, 17 to 23 minutes. Remove from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack, 15 to 30 minutes.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.

moroccan-lamb-shanks-with-pomegranate.name: Moroccan Lamb Shanks With Pomegranate

ingredients.prep: white and light-green parts only, cut into 2-inch pieces

ingredients.item: A spice mill or a mortar and pestle

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Coarsely grind coriander seeds, cumin seeds, fennel seeds, and red pepper flakes in spice mill or with mortar and pestle. Crumble saffron into spice mixture, if using, and stir in 1 tsp. kosher salt plus black pepper to taste.

If there is an opaque white layer enrobing shanks, remove by cutting it a bit at the edge, then pulling at the corner: It should come off with a little coaxing. Do not remove iridescent membrane below, which holds the meat together. Sprinkle shanks with coriander mixture, then let rest at least 30 minutes or up to overnight.

Thirty minutes before you want to cook them, dredge shanks in cornstarch, shaking off any excess. Heat oil in a large heavy braising dish or Dutch oven over medium. Add shanks and cook until browned on all sides, 10–12 minutes. Transfer shanks to a platter or baking dish; add onion, carrots, and leek to pan. Cook, stirring and scraping up any brown bits that have accumulated, 1 minute. Add cinnamon and thyme and pour in pomegranate juice and stock. Scrape pan again, then bring mixture to a simmer. Return shanks to pan and season with kosher salt and black pepper.

Cover pot and transfer to oven. Braise 1½ hours, then check liquid level, making sure there is at least 1" stock in pan; if not, add water or stock to bring it up to that mark. Continue braising until meat is completely tender and falling off the bone, about 2½ hours.

Using a slotted spoon, transfer meat and large chunks of vegetables to a plate. Discard thyme and cinnamon stick. Using a spoon, skim off as much fat as possible from the surface; tilting the pan a bit can help with gathering fat. To serve, bring liquid to a simmer and cook meat and vegetables until warmed through, if needed.
Serve lamb pieces off the bone with some sauce and top with pomegranate seeds, mint leaves, and flaky sea salt.
